task_completion.description: The 'monitor' service in docker-compose.yml is updated to remove the direct socket mount and use the proxy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing docker-compose.yml where the 'monitor' service no longer has '/var/run/docker.sock' in its volumes, and has the environment variable 'DOCKER_HOST=tcp://proxy:2375' added.

task_completion.description: A 'proxy' service is added to docker-compose.yml using nginx:alpine.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing docker-compose.yml with a new 'proxy' service that uses the 'nginx:alpine' image, mounts the '/var/run/docker.sock' volume, and mounts a custom nginx configuration file.

task_completion.description: An nginx configuration file is created to proxy requests to the Docker socket and restrict to GET requests.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing an nginx configuration file (e.g., nginx.conf or default.conf) that listens on port 2375, uses 'proxy_pass' to route traffic to the unix socket (e.g., http://unix:/var/run/docker.sock:/), and includes directives to restrict access to GET requests only (e.g., using 'limit_except GET' or checking '$request_method').

task_completion.description: The Docker Compose stack is running with both services.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing the execution of 'docker compose up' or 'docker ps' / 'docker compose ps', confirming that both the 'monitor' and 'proxy' containers are successfully running.
